name: Plytix PIM API
what_it_does: Product Information Management (PIM) platform built for small and medium businesses with REST API — centralizing product data and digital assets, managing product spreadsheets collaboratively, distributing product content to e-commerce channels and print catalogs, with built-in DAM for image and file management.
use_cases: Importing product data from CSV or ERP systems into Plytix via REST API
Querying product completeness and attribute status for operations dashboards
Syncing enriched product data to Shopify or WooCommerce channels via API
Managing product families and attribute relationships programmatically
Automating product data export for retailer partner data feeds
not_for: Enterprise PIM for 100,000+ SKU catalogs (use Akeneo or inRiver for scale)
Purely technical product data without marketing content needs
best_when: A small-to-mid retailer or brand with 100-50,000 SKUs wants an affordable, user-friendly PIM with built-in DAM, without the implementation complexity of enterprise PIM.
avoid_when: You have a massive SKU catalog (>100K), need complex workflow governance, or require deep ERP integration that enterprise PIMs offer.

auth.notes: OAuth2 client credentials flow to obtain access token. Client ID and client secret from Plytix account. Token endpoint for access token retrieval. Bearer token in Authorization header for API calls. Token expiry requires periodic refresh. No webhooks currently.

pricing.notes: Spanish company (Barcelona/Boston). Founded 2016. SMB-focused PIM with good UX. Built-in DAM for product images. Shopify and WooCommerce native integrations. Spreadsheet-like editing for non-technical users. 2,000+ brands worldwide. Competitive pricing vs enterprise PIM. Good onboarding support.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for products, assets, families, and channels. OAuth2 client credentials. Good documentation at apidocs.plytix.com. Token refresh required on expiry. Product family schema must be configured before API data operations. No webhooks — polling for changes.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Product reads idempotent by ID. Asset reads idempotent. Product updates idempotent by product ID. Product creation idempotent by SKU reference.
known_agent_gotchas: OAuth2 client credentials flow — must obtain access token before API calls
Token expiry requires refresh logic — implement token refresh in API client
Product family and attribute schema must be configured in UI before API use
No webhooks — implement polling scheduler for data synchronization
Spanish company — support hours in CET timezone

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. EU data residency (Spain/EU). OAuth2 client credentials. Product data may include proprietary pricing — secure client credentials. Spanish company with EU data protection practices.
